text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka wants me to tag along to her extra
workout session, so I arrive at the gym to meet
her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Do you think the bigger you are,
the stronger and cooler you are?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm just sayin'—being big isn't everything, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be sturdy too, like those
heavyweight American motorcycles.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But! I'd never considered that before.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All I was focusin' on was gettin' bigger and bigger!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't listen to this anymore. Is that why you've been eating so much lately?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: S-Scarlet?! How long have you been there?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Shouldn't you be watching your intake? I mean, not that I care if you tank your own speed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Y-you don't have to tell me! That was my
plan anyway!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now's the time to pump iron till I get wicked
beefy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Do your best, unless you want to end up
making me look good.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Grrr! No way am I lettin' that happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think the bomb Daiwa Scarlet threw on her had
an effect, because Vodka continues fiercely
working out until she's back to normal shape.
